tests.note: Unit tests created for resume-handler.test.ts with Deno test framework. Tests run in Supabase Edge Function environment.

lint.note: No new lint warnings introduced. Supabase Edge Functions ignored by ESLint (validated by Deno on deploy)

implementation: Created resume-handler.ts module with complete /resume command implementation
Implemented parseResumeCommand to extract session ID and --restart flag
Implemented getIncompleteSessions to query pending/running/paused sessions from database
Implemented getSessionById to fetch specific session with current iteration count
Implemented restartSession to reset session status to pending
Implemented handleResumeCommand as main entry point with error handling
Added ResumeSession and ResumeSessionListCardData types to slash-commands.ts
Re-exported all resume handler functions from slash-commands.ts for convenience
Created comprehensive unit tests covering all parser variations

acceptance_criteria.description: User sends /resume -> Returns ResumeSessionList card with incomplete sessions
acceptance_criteria.note: handleResumeCommand returns card_type: 'resume_session_list' with sessions array when no args provided

acceptance_criteria.description: User sends /resume abc-123 -> Resumes session from last checkpoint
acceptance_criteria.note: handleResumeCommand fetches session and returns success message with iteration count

acceptance_criteria.description: User sends /resume invalid-id -> Returns error message
acceptance_criteria.note: handleResumeCommand handles not-found case and returns user-friendly error

acceptance_criteria.description: User sends /resume with --restart flag -> Restarts session from beginning
acceptance_criteria.note: restartSession function updates session status to pending, handleResumeCommand parses --restart flag

patterns_followed: TypeScript strict mode with proper type definitions
Comprehensive error handling with try-catch blocks
Query optimization with indexed columns (status, updated_at)
